name: LOGICBIO THERAP. DL-,0001
summary: LOGICBIO THERAP. DL-,0001 is likely referring to LogicBio Therapeutics, Inc., a genetic medicine company focused on developing therapies for rare diseases. They are pioneering a new approach to genetic medicine using their GeneRide™ technology platform. LogicBio's focus is on developing treatments for pediatric liver diseases.
